relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file captures a hardship assistance request with financial details and relief options, while the outbound file reports arrears status across multiple accounts. These represent fundamentally different business processes: one is a request intake, the other is a status report. The only overlapping concepts are customer_id/customerId and account identifiers, but the outbound file's array structure and arrears-specific fields (arrearsAmount, arrearsMonths, riskLevel) have no corresponding sources in the inbound schema. The outbound file appears to be a general arrears status broadcast unrelated to hardship request processing.
